sentences.target: Je travaille dans le secteur médical.

translations.fr: Je travaille dans le secteur médical.
translations.en: I work in the medical sector.
translations.pt: Eu trabalho na área da saúde.
translations.vi: Tôi làm việc trong ngành y tế.
translations.hi: मैं स्वास्थ्य क्षेत्र में काम करता हूँ.
translations.ja: 医療分野で働いています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject of the verb 'travaille'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; predicate of the clause, taking a locative PP complement.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase 'dans le secteur médical' functioning as a locative/complement of the verb.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'secteur'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the NP 'le secteur', complement of the preposition 'dans'.
Adjective, masculine singular; post-nominal modifier of 'secteur' specifying its domain.

sentences.target: Il y a des travaux dans ce secteur.
sentences.reading: /il i a de tʁavo dɑ̃ sə sɛktœʁ/

translations.fr: Il y a des travaux dans ce secteur.
translations.ipa: /il i a de tʁavo dɑ̃ sə sɛktœʁ/
translations.de: In dieser Gegend gibt es Bauarbeiten.
translations.it: Ci sono lavori in corso in questa zona.
translations.ru: В этом районе идут строительные работы.
translations.vi: Khu vực này đang thi công.
translations.ar: هناك أعمال بناء في هذه المنطقة.
translations.nl: Er zijn werkzaamheden in deze buurt.
translations.uk: У цьому районі ведуться будівельні роботи.
translations.hi: इस इलाके में निर्माण कार्य चल रहा है.
translations.pl: W tej okolicy trwają prace budowlane.
translations.el: Σε αυτή την περιοχή γίνονται έργα.
translations.nb: Det er anleggsarbeid i dette området.
translations.id: Ada pekerjaan konstruksi di area ini.
translations.sv: Det är byggarbete i det här området.
translations.cs: V této oblasti jsou stavební práce.
translations.da: Der er byggearbejde i dette område.
translations.ja: この地域で工事があります。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/expletive subject pronoun in the existential construction 'il y a'.
Clitic locative pronoun; part of the fixed existential sequence 'il y a'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; in 'il y a', takes a notional pivot as its direct object.
Indefinite plural article; determiner of 'travaux'.
Common noun, masculine plural (irregular plural of 'travail'); direct object of 'a' in the existential construction.
Preposition introducing the locative PP 'dans ce secteur' modifying 'travaux'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; determiner of 'secteur'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the NP within the PP 'dans ce secteur'.

sentences.target: On cherche un appartement dans ce secteur.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ œ̃n apaʁtəmɑ̃ dɑ̃ sə sɛktœʁ/

translations.fr: On cherche un appartement dans ce secteur.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ œ̃n apaʁtəmɑ̃ dɑ̃ sə sɛktœʁ/
translations.en: We’re looking for an apartment in this area.
translations.es: Buscamos un piso en esta zona.
translations.de: Wir suchen eine Wohnung in dieser Gegend.
translations.it: Cerchiamo un appartamento in questa zona.
translations.ko: 우리는 이 지역에서 아파트를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在这个区域找公寓。
translations.ru: Мы ищем квартиру в этом районе.
translations.pt: Estamos à procura de um apartamento nesta área.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm căn hộ ở khu vực này.
translations.ar: نبحث عن شقة في هذه المنطقة.
translations.nl: We zoeken een appartement in deze buurt.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо квартиру в цьому районі.
translations.hi: हम इस इलाके में एक अपार्टमेंट ढूँढ़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε διαμέρισμα σε αυτή την περιοχή.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter en leilighet i dette området.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari apartemen di area ini.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en lägenhet i det här området.
translations.ro: Căutăm un apartament în această zonă.
translations.da: Vi leder efter en lejlighed i dette område.
translations.ja: この地域でアパートを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, generic; here controls 3rd person singular agreement on 'cherche'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object 'un appartement' and a locative PP.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'appartement'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing the PP 'dans ce secteur', an adverbial/locative complement to 'cherche'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; determiner of 'secteur'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the NP within the PP 'dans ce secteur'.

sentences.target: Ce secteur est tranquille le soir.

translations.fr: Ce secteur est tranquille le soir.
translations.en: This area is quiet in the evening.
translations.es: Esta zona es tranquila por la noche.
translations.it: Questa zona è tranquilla la sera.
translations.pt: Esta área é tranquila à noite.
translations.vi: Khu vực này yên tĩnh vào buổi tối.
translations.hi: यह इलाका शाम को शांत रहता है.
translations.el: Αυτή η περιοχή είναι ήσυχη το βράδυ.
translations.nb: Dette området er rolig om kvelden.
translations.id: Area ini tenang pada malam hari.
translations.sv: Det här området är lugnt på kvällen.
translations.da: Dette område er roligt om aftenen.
translations.ja: この地域は夜は静かです。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; determiner of 'secteur'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the copular clause.
Copular verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject 'Ce secteur' to the predicate adjective 'tranquille'.
Adjective; predicative complement of the subject with 'est'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'soir'. Forms the NP 'le soir' used adverbially.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the NP 'le soir', functioning as a temporal adjunct.
